---
title: "Notes: Session 2: Analytical data architecture"
format: html
---

::: callout-note
TODO

Clarify: OLTP <-> OLAP
OLTP -> ETL -> DWH -> OLAP

Distinguish fact and dimension tables


Learning objective: writing SQL queries!?

Illustrate: OLAP as a "systems approach", notebooks as a more flexible data science approach

Rotating hypercube: similar to rotating in tidy-data preparation?

Extract exercises?

TBD: complete the exercise on paper? provide a PDF version?

:::


<!--
::: callout-note
See /home/gerit/workspace/projects/abd/nextcloud/Material/ABD/exercises/Solutions_DW-Modelling.pdf
TODO: existing exercise sheet?
https://github.com/ShantanilBagchi/DataCamp/blob/master/SQL%20Courses/Database%20Design/Solutions.md
https://gitlab.ost.ch/db/datana/-/blob/master/Uebungen/02_DW_OLAP/README.adoc
:::
-->
